expectations.evidence: internal/config/turbodocx.go exists as a Go config/client file for TurboDocx
internal/config/turbodocx.go creates both turbodocx.NewClientWithConfig (TurboSignClient function) and turbodocx.NewPartnerClient (TurboPartnerClient function)
All handler functions use *gin.Context parameter (e.g. func (h *TurboSignHandler) SendSignature(c *gin.Context), func (h *TurboPartnerHandler) CreateOrganization(c *gin.Context))
main.go uses api := r.Group("/api") and handlers register routes with rg.POST, rg.GET patterns in RegisterRoutes methods
.env contains all 6 vars: TURBODOCX_API_KEY, TURBODOCX_ORG_ID, TURBODOCX_SENDER_EMAIL, TURBODOCX_SENDER_NAME, TURBODOCX_PARTNER_API_KEY, TURBODOCX_PARTNER_ID
Handler code uses c.Request.Context() for SDK calls (e.g. h.client.TurboSign.SendSignature(c.Request.Context(), ...) and h.partner.CreateOrganization(c.Request.Context(), ...))
New files placed in internal/ directory: internal/config/turbodocx.go, internal/handlers/turbosign.go, internal/handlers/turbopartner.go
